actions.intent: Open the right-side route material first, breaking blockers without committing to broad side farming.
Continue the central lane read and start meaningful progress on the lower puppy.
Clear the left-side blocker access needed for the second rescue route.
Open the upper puppy's lane while keeping both rescues advancing instead of collecting side value.
Pay a small dock cost to preserve the route and avoid losing the central read.
Create one-clear-away states for both puppies and use the dock triple clear to recover space.
Clear the left bottom blocker chain so the lower puppy can be finished first.
Extract the lower water-near puppy before the water row becomes the main threat.
Pivot upward after the urgent rescue and prepare the final upper route.
Finish the upper puppy and complete the intended central-lane-first solve.

notes: Designer-approved intended path for the larger-board read: central route work first, lower puppy before upper, no reliance on broad side farming.
